narrative:
Miami Twp. township has 12,561 registered voters, with 51.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.1 percentage points.
